subcodes.first_line: This is God, your Lord; His is the creation and the command. There is no God but Him, the Mighty, the Best-Beloved. He it is Who giveth life and bringeth death [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. ذلکم الله ربکم له الخلق و الامر لا اله الا هو العزیز المحبوب هو الذی یحی و یمیت

writing_refs.type_name: Selections from the Writings of the Báb
